Alpine.js — vendored locally for the Open Omniscience "alternative interfaces"
gallery (the Command and Canvas UIs). Loopback-only, zero network: this file is
served from 127.0.0.1/static, never a CDN. It makes no outbound request (the one
URL it contains, https://alpinejs.dev/plugins/, is a string in a console warning,
not a fetch), so it does not change the app's offline / anonymity posture.

  Package : alpinejs
  Version : 3.14.1  (dist/cdn.min.js, the global IIFE build)
  Source  : https://registry.npmjs.org/alpinejs/-/alpinejs-3.14.1.tgz
  SHA-256  (vendored alpine.min.js): see alpine.min.js.sha256
  License : MIT
  Project : https://alpinejs.dev  ·  https://github.com/alpinejs/alpine
